## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include any error messages.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, paste error logs or add screenshots here.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17]
- LLM Providers configured: [e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic]
- GPS Mode / Debate Mode / Single Mode
- Self-hosted (Docker) or local dev: [Docker / `npm run dev`]

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
